title: picris hieracioides var. arenaria
intro: Picris hieracioides var. arenaria, also known as Sea Hawksbeard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sea Hawksbeard include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
